content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
To develop an understanding of IPR/ research methodology in the process of creation of patents through research. To develop further research capabilities. To learn better report writing skills and Patenting.
Contenu de la matière
RESEARCH METHODOLOGY:
RESEARCH DESIGN
RESEARCH REPORT WRITING
NATURE OF INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
PATENT RIGHTS
Mode d’évaluation : examen Références
Ranjit Kumar, “Research Methodology: A Step by Step Guide for beginners”, SAGE Publications Ltd.
Halbert, “Resisting Intellectual Property”, Taylor & Francis Ltd
